title: West Fayette Street Closed for Sink Hole Repair
summary: The City of Syracuse Department of Water is repairing a sinkhole on the 100-block of West Fayette Street between South Salina and Clinton Streets. The street is closed to vehicular traffic beginning June 22, 2023, with no disruption to water service. Businesses remain accessible via sidewalk, and residents can contact Cityline for questions.
processing_notes: Author listed as Unknown; press release attributed to Mayor's office by URL structure
No dollar amount provided for repair costs
Timeline: assessment began 6/21, repairs scheduled to start 6/22
No department head attribution detected beyond Department of Water
Contact information provided via Cityline 311 system and SYR Cityline app
Road closure duration indefinite; only note is 'expected to remain closed during repairs'
